welcome.title: Who is signing in?
welcome.subtitle: Pick your household to enter the dashboard. You will only be able to see and compare your own savings — to switch, sign out from Settings.

home.welcomeBody: This dashboard compares the traditional grid bill against the community's Mid-Price settlement so every household can see, in forint, what shared energy is worth.
home.shortcutsSubtitle: Every view respects the selected date window and active household.

shortcuts.mySavings: See how much your household would save this month.
shortcuts.community: Aggregate savings, self-sufficiency, and per-house breakdown.
shortcuts.profit: Compare what prosumers earn selling to the community vs the grid.
shortcuts.live: Inspect the latest hour of supply and demand across the community.

kpis.selfSufficiencyHint: Share of demand covered by community solar

ab.title: Without vs With Community
ab.subtitle: Total cost across the selected window
ab.subtitlePersonal: Your household, over the selected window

table.title: Per-household settlement
table.subtitle: Sorted by name. Positive savings mean the community model is cheaper than grid-only.

kpi.selfSufficiencyHint: Share of demand covered by community solar

profit.title: Prosumer profit increment
profit.description: Revenue when selling into the community at 22.5 Ft/kWh compared to 5 Ft/kWh into the grid.

kpi.totalIncrementHint: Across all prosumers in the window
kpi.gridOnlyHint: If each kWh shared had been sold to grid at 5 Ft

profitIncrement.title: Extra revenue from the community
profitIncrement.body: As a prosumer, each kWh you shared with the community earned 22.5 Ft instead of 5 Ft.
profitIncrement.explain: This figure is calculated from the kWh you sold into the community in the selected window.

source.title: Realtime source mix
source.subtitle: Latest settlement hour in the selected window

live.recentSubtitle: Rolling view of community supply and demand

account.title: Signed-in household
account.subtitle: Your identity is locked for this session. Sign out to return to the selection screen.

window.title: Active date window
window.subtitle: The window controls are available in the top bar and apply to every page.

danger.title: Reset for a new Data Drop
danger.subtitle: Use this to clear all ingested measurements before re-uploading from PowerMocker.
danger.body: Users are preserved; only energy_records is truncated.

savings.title: Daily cost comparison
savings.subtitle: Sum of hourly settlement per day in the selected window

self.title: Daily self-sufficiency
self.subtitle: Share of community demand covered by community supply per day

noData: No data ingested yet. Run the PowerMocker uploader.
